epics.name: EPIC-1: Risk CRUD & Core Management
epics.summary: Establish foundational risk management with CRUD operations, automatic ID generation, and comprehensive risk tracking
epics.description: Enable Risk Officers to create, retrieve, update, and delete risks with automatic ID generation. Implement comprehensive risk property tracking, searchable inventory, lifecycle management, audit trails, and role-based access control.

stories.summary: Create Risk with Automatic ID Generation
stories.description: Implement automatic risk ID generation following company standard (ABC-DEPT## format) with unique constraints and validation
tasks: Design risk ID generation algorithm (ABC-DEPT## format)
Implement database unique constraint on risk_id field
Create API endpoint POST /api/v1/risks with auto-ID generation
Add validation for required fields (description, owner, department)
Implement error handling for duplicate ID scenarios
Add audit logging for risk creation events

stories.summary: List & Filter Risks with Sorting & Pagination
stories.description: Build searchable, filterable risk inventory with advanced filtering, sorting, and pagination capabilities
tasks: Implement GET /api/v1/risks endpoint with query parameters
Add filtering by department, owner, status, date ranges
Implement sorting by risk_id, created_date, modified_date
Add pagination with limit/offset and total count
Create database indexes for filter/sort fields

stories.summary: Update Risk with Partial & Full Updates
stories.description: Support both partial (PATCH) and full (PUT) risk updates with validation and audit trails
tasks: Implement optimistic locking with ETag headers
Add audit logging for all field changes

stories.summary: Delete Risk with Soft-Delete & Audit Trail
stories.description: Implement soft-delete functionality with audit trails and restore capabilities
tasks: Add deleted_at timestamp field to risks table
Add audit logging for delete/restore operations
Update list endpoints to exclude soft-deleted records
Implement hard delete for admin users (if needed)

stories.summary: Retrieve Risk by ID with Full Details
stories.description: Create detailed risk retrieval endpoint with all risk properties and related data
tasks: Return complete risk object with all fields
Add error handling for non-existent risks (404)
Include related data (owner details, department info)
Add response caching with ETag headers

stories.description: Implement risk status transitions with validation and workflow constraints
tasks: Update risk list filtering by status
Add audit logging for status changes

epics.name: EPIC-2: Risk Analysis & Scoring
epics.summary: Implement comprehensive risk scoring with impact and likelihood analysis
epics.description: Build risk scoring framework with impact (1-5) and likelihood (1-5) scales, automatic risk score calculation (Impact × Likelihood), and detailed analysis documentation

stories.description: Implement 5-point impact scale with financial, operational, compliance, reputational, and security impact categories
tasks: Add qualitative descriptions for each level

stories.description: Implement 5-point likelihood scale with threat landscape, control effectiveness, incident history, and vulnerability factors
tasks: Add qualitative descriptions for each level

stories.description: Implement automatic risk score calculation with severity levels and inherent vs residual score tracking
tasks: Add severity levels (Low=1-5, Medium=6-12, High=13-18, Critical=19-25)
Add automatic calculation triggers on score updates

stories.description: Build detailed impact analysis with financial impact ranges, operational impact assessment, and compliance implications
tasks: Implement impact analysis validation and storage

stories.description: Build detailed likelihood analysis with threat landscape assessment, control effectiveness evaluation, and incident history tracking
tasks: Implement likelihood analysis validation and storage

epics.name: EPIC-3: Risk Workflows & Approvals
epics.summary: Implement risk treatment workflows, approval processes, and remediation task management
epics.description: Build comprehensive risk treatment framework with ACCEPT/MITIGATE/AVOID/TRANSFER strategies, multi-level approval workflows, and remediation task tracking

stories.description: Implement 7-state Kanban workflow (Open → UnderReview → ReadyForReview → Approved → FinalClosed → Archived) with validation
tasks: Define workflow states and valid transitions
Add workflow state validation and constraints

stories.description: Implement four treatment strategies (ACCEPT, MITIGATE, AVOID, TRANSFER) with strategy-specific workflows and tracking

stories.summary: Risk Approval Workflows with Multiple Stakeholders
stories.description: Build multi-level approval system with severity-based approver assignment and approval tracking
tasks: Define approval matrix by risk severity
Create approval workflow tables and relationships
Add approval status tracking and notifications

stories.description: Implement remediation task creation, tracking, and completion with status updates and overdue handling
tasks: Add task status tracking (Not Started, In Progress, Complete)
Implement task assignment and due date management
